seo.title: Matchmaker Partnerships | HeartLink
seo.description: Partner with HeartLink on profile matching, referrals and operating under the HeartLink advisory umbrella.

hero.title: Trusted networks. A stronger standard.
hero.description: HeartLink works with established matchmakers and trusted connectors when shared judgment, discretion and complementary networks can create a better outcome.

models.title: Collaborate without compromising trust.
models.description: Every partnership begins with alignment on privacy, consent and client care.

cards.label: 01 · Profile collaboration
cards.title: Work together on a match.
cards.description: Share selected, consented opportunities across trusted networks while each advisor protects their client relationship.

cards.label: 02 · Referral partnership
cards.title: Refer a mandate with confidence.
cards.description: Introduce clients whose needs fit HeartLink’s curation or advisory model through a clear and discreet referral process.

cards.label: 03 · HeartLink network
cards.title: Operate within our umbrella.
cards.description: Experienced matchmakers may explore joining HeartLink’s standards, systems and wider network as an aligned partner.

form.introduction: Tell us about your practice, network and the kind of collaboration you have in mind.
